Dry Bulk Shipping
Bi-Weekly Industry Report
September 2, 2025
• Capesize Enters September on a High Note - Following one of the strongest
Short-term Indicators
Augusts in recent history for Capesize spot rates, early September appears
Momentum: Neutral
equally promising for large bulk carriers. In the Atlantic basin, steady demand has
absorbed the excess tonnage that accumulated in recent weeks, keeping rates firm. Sentiment: Neutral
In the Pacific, robust iron ore exports from Australia continue to drive demand and Fundamentals: Neutral
attract tonnage, thereby limiting the number of ballasting vessels.
